abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection} by sharing an inspiring or enlightening song, poem, or tale, envision the story you tell. Then, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.LzbHBsqjqOWtSmnX]{Make Camp}, you may share a story with your allies or compose a new story if alone. If you do, envision the story you tell and take +1 spirit or +1 momentum. Any allies who choose to relax in your company may also take +1 spirit or +1 momentum.
When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3de42d2d3cb78855]{Sojourn} with someone with whom you share a bond, add +2 and take +1 spirit or +1 momentum on a hit.
